MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE KROGER CO., CALA FOODS INC.'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damage Allegations From Plaintiff's Complaint Asserted Against Defendants The Kroger Co. and Cala Foods, Inc. Appearances: Theordore F. Aldrich, Esq. of Brady, Vorwerck, Ryder & Caspino, (925) 274-9500, appearing for Defendant and moving party. There are no other appearances. (Counsel asserts to the Court that the tentative ruling was not available). Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Ten days leave granted to file answer. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
